\tzpentry{ID4401}{Helix Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4401 introduces Helix Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Hhat_{p}^{\mathrm{helix}} = \sum_{\sigma=\pm} \Hhat_{p,\sigma}^{\mathrm{free}} + \Hhat_{p}^{\mathrm{coup}}, \label{eq:Hp-helix} \end{equation}
